description: Analytic Mie resonance root catalogue for the dielectric sphere (n = 1.5, R_s = 1.0) inside a PEC cavity (R_b = 2.0) — issue #170, parent epic #88, Phase J.1. SciPy reference (reference/numpy/mie_roots.py) for geode_core::mie::{resonance_roots, merged_roots, mie_roots_catalog}: TE/TM roots for l = 1..4, first 5 roots per channel, stored sorted by the canonical (pol, l, n) key (pol: 0 = TE, 1 = TM).
units: k in inverse length, same units as R_s / R_b (dimensionless geometry)

n_inside.description: Refractive index of the inner sphere.

l_max.description: Maximum angular order in the catalogue (matches examples/mie_sphere.rs L_MAX).

n_max.description: Roots per (l, polarisation) channel (matches examples/mie_sphere.rs N_MAX).

n_inside.description: Refractive index (replicated as output for harness-side constant pinning).

r_sphere.description: R_s (replicated as output; must equal Burn mesh::R_SPHERE).

r_buffer.description: R_b (replicated as output; must equal Burn mesh::R_BUFFER).

root_pol.description: Polarisation tag per root: 0 = TE, 1 = TM.

root_n.description: Radial order n per root (1 = lowest in window).

root_k.description: Resonance positions k, ordered by (pol, l, n) in lockstep with root_pol / root_l / root_n. brentq-refined to near machine precision; cross-check contract is <= 1e-10 relative.

root_count_te.description: TE root count per l = 1..l_max (after the n_max cap).

root_count_tm.description: TM root count per l = 1..l_max (after the n_max cap).

provenance.source: reference/numpy/mie_roots.py — SciPy (scipy.special.spherical_jn/spherical_yn + scipy.optimize.brentq) reimplementation of geode_core::mie with the identical dense-sampling bracket walk (30000 samples on (0.1, 20.0], 1e8 pole-rejection, 1e-5 consecutive dedup).
provenance.verified_against: crates/geode-validation/tests/mie_roots_numpy_reference.rs — root-for-root (pol, l, n) join at <= 1e-10 relative.
provenance.issue: #170 (Epic #88, Phase J.1); generated at git commit e46571a
